name: Armin Arlert
description:
❝ Would've lived a thousands lives (just to get)... ❞

As Armin stays awake after losing his virginity to the person he's been pining after since freshman year, he realizes Eren never coached him in what to do afterwards...

❝ My hands on you; I fell into this spell you do... ❞

⚠️ for those of you horny for armin but also those that like comedy. do a giggle and some marathon sex idk ... more popular / unpopular <3
